start.description:
Track your sleep, analyze patterns, and improve your sleep quality.

Let's get started with a quick setup. Type /help to see all available commands.

onboarding.question_bedtime: What time do you usually go to bed? (HH:MM format, e.g., 22:00)
onboarding.question_waketime: What time do you usually wake up? (HH:MM format, e.g., 06:00)
onboarding.question_target_hours: How many hours of sleep is your goal? (e.g., 8)
onboarding.question_timezone: What is your timezone? (e.g., Europe/Tallinn, America/New_York)
onboarding.invalid_time: Invalid time format. Please use HH:MM format (e.g., 22:00)
onboarding.invalid_hours: Invalid hours. Please enter a number between 1 and 24
onboarding.invalid_timezone: Invalid timezone. Please enter a valid timezone (e.g., Europe/Tallinn)
onboarding.timezone_location_prompt: Let's set your timezone. Share your location for auto-detection:
onboarding.timezone_location_failed: Could not detect timezone from location.
onboarding.timezone_use_buttons: Please use the buttons above, or press "Other" to type manually.
onboarding.completed:
✅ Setup completed! You're all set to start tracking your sleep.

Use /sleep when you go to bed and /wake when you wake up.

help.title: 📚 Available Commands
help.commands_list:
/start - Initialize bot and configure preferences
/help - Show this help message
/language - Change interface language
/sleep - Start sleep tracking
/wake - Stop tracking and view statistics
/quality <rating> - Rate your sleep quality (1-10)
/note <text> - Add notes about your sleep
/stats - View and export your sleep statistics

sleep.started:
😴 Sleep tracking started at {time}

Good night! Use /wake when you wake up.
sleep.already_active:
⚠️ You already have an active sleep session started at {time}

What would you like to do?
sleep.already_active_save_and_start: 💾 Save current session ({duration}h {minutes}m) and start new
sleep.session_saved:
✅ Previous sleep session saved ({duration}h {minutes}m)
😴 New sleep session started at {time}
sleep.session_cancelled:
🔄 Previous session cancelled
😴 New sleep session started at {time}

wake.no_active_session:
⚠️ You don't have an active sleep session.

Use /sleep to start tracking your sleep.
wake.goal_met: 🎯 You slept {duration}h {minutes}m, that's {percentage}% of your goal ({target_hours}h)! Great job!
wake.goal_not_met: 📉 You slept {duration}h {minutes}m, that's {percentage}% of your goal ({target_hours}h). Try to sleep more tonight!
wake.no_goal: Set your sleep goals with /start to get personalized insights.

quality.no_last_session:
⚠️ No sleep session found.

Complete a sleep session first with /sleep and /wake
quality.already_rated:
⚠️ You already rated this session with {rating}/10.

Do you want to update it?
quality.confirm_overwrite:
⚠️ You already rated this session with {rating}/10.

Do you want to change it to {new_rating}/10?
quality.old_session_warning:
⚠️ This sleep session was {time_ago}.

Are you sure you want to rate it now with {rating}/10?
quality.select_rating:
⭐ How would you rate your sleep quality?

Select a rating from 1 (very poor) to 10 (excellent):
quality.enter_custom:
✏️ Or enter a custom rating (1.0 - 10.0):

Example: /quality 8.5
quality.invalid_format:
⚠️ Please provide a number between 1 and 10.

Example: /quality 8 or /quality 7.5
quality.invalid_range:
⚠️ Rating must be between 1 and 10.

Example: /quality 8
quality.saved:
✅ Sleep quality rated: {rating}/10

Thank you for your feedback!
quality.saved_suggest_note:
✅ Sleep quality rated: {rating}/10

Thank you for your feedback!

💡 You can also add notes: /note
quality.cancelled: ❌ Rating cancelled. Your previous rating remains unchanged.

note.no_last_session:
⚠️ No sleep session found.

Complete a sleep session first with /sleep and /wake
note.waiting_for_note:
📝 Please write your note about the sleep session:

Example: Had trouble falling asleep, woke up several times
note.empty:
⚠️ Please provide a note.

Example: /note Had trouble falling asleep
note.confirm_overwrite:
⚠️ You already have a note for this session:

"{existing_note}"

Do you want to replace it with:

"{new_note}"?
note.old_session_warning:
⚠️ This sleep session was {time_ago}.

Are you sure you want to add a note now?
note.saved:
✅ Note saved for your last sleep session:

"{note}"
note.updated:
✅ Note updated for your last sleep session:

"{note}"
note.saved_suggest_quality:
✅ Note saved for your last sleep session:

"{note}"

💡 You can also rate your sleep quality: /quality
note.cancelled: ❌ Note cancelled. Your previous note remains unchanged.

stats.title: 📊 Sleep Statistics
stats.no_data:
📭 No sleep data found for the selected period.

Start tracking your sleep with /sleep and /wake!
stats.exported:
✅ Sleep statistics exported!

📊 Summary:
• Total sessions: {total_sessions}
• Average duration: {avg_duration}h
• Average quality: {avg_quality}/10

Your data is attached below.
stats.invalid_date: ⚠️ Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., 2026-01-01)
stats.date_out_of_range:
⚠️ Date is outside your tracking period.

You started using the bot on {first_date}
stats.custom_date_cancelled:
❌ Custom date selection cancelled.

Use /stats to start over.

errors.generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.
